note: Opaque condition ids (s1..s6). The measurer must emit channels per id WITHOUT reading key.json and WITHOUT branching on condition identity. Each `steps[i]` is the set of basis-atom keys deposited at step i; a 'newcomer' is an atom appearing for the first time. Every step deposits exactly ONE unit of mass, so the total gamma-decayed mass at the probe is IDENTICAL across all conditions of equal length — the loud surface signal held flat by construction. `probe` is a genuinely-unseen atom delivered at the final step.

draws.title: Dean of Ely
draws.role: sense A content — an ecclesiastical succession: a persisting office (the See) attested across steps, with new office-holders (deans) as newcomers

draws.title: Swing Street
draws.role: sense B content — a tonal stream: a sustained tone, with new pitches as newcomers

seed_of_record.collision: an ecclesiastical succession (Dean of Ely) and a music album (Swing Street) forced into one shape: a stream whose RECENT NOVELTY RATE varies — a burst of newcomers at the end vs. at the start vs. none — read once as figures-over-an-office (text/proposition basis) and once as pitches-over-a-drone (tonal basis).
